prose:
**Formaldehyde frontier-orbital result** — Property: HOMO–LUMO gap from a frontier-orbitals calculation. Method used: DFT tier `standard`, explicitly `b3lyp/def2-tzvp`, in PySCF; density fitting was not enabled. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ geometry at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz` (4 atoms), not reported as re-optimized by this task. Environment: gas phase (`solvent: null`). Charge 0, multiplicity 1.

Headline result: HOMO–LUMO gap = **5.8696712 eV**.

Orbital energies returned by chemkit: HOMO = -7.6523067 eV; LUMO = -1.7826355 eV. Total electronic energy = -114.55325 hartree = -3117.1528 eV. Koopmans-style values returned: vertical IP = 7.6523067 eV; vertical EA = 1.7826355 eV.

Convergence/integrity: SCF converged = true in 8 cycles. Engine integrity trustworthy verdict: **true** (`status: ok`). No warnings were returned in the chemkit result.

Reproducibility: input file = `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz`. CLI invocation returned by chemkit: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpnsoah2gt/live.json`.

Live `.out` log path: chemkit did not return a live `.out` path in the JSON result I received, so I cannot state one without fabricating it.
